user_goal: B020 dev infra 已签收（commit e47542b），按 ADR cloud addendum 路线起 B021 Cloud Deploy & Auth。本批次纯基础设施层：(F001) Google OAuth via NextAuth.js v5 + 后端 JWT cookie 验证 + 单 email allowlist；(F002) SQLite + Alembic migration + Repository 数据层 + workbench-bootstrap CLI 从 accounts/me.json + backlog.json 导入；(F003) systemd workbench-{backend,frontend}.service + nginx vhost trade.guangai.ai + certbot 准备 + CPUQuota=200% + MemoryMax=2G + OOMScoreAdjust=500 隔离邻居（kolquest / aigcgateway / apify-kol）；(F004) GitHub Actions workbench-deploy.yml workflow_run 链触发 + scp + SSH deploy + healthcheck + symlink rollback + PLACEHOLDER-REPLACE-ME pre-flight grep；(F005) systemd-timer 触发 SQLite snapshot → gzip → GCS 30 daily + 12 monthly retention + restore script，需用户先做 VM SA scope 扩展（manual prereq, ~30-60s 跨服务下线）；(F006) Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + observability (enriched /api/health + 结构化 log + 可选 Sentry) + signoff。**禁止引入：** 任何业务页面 / 执行 UI / 多用户 / 注册 / broker SDK / paper or live URL / Cloud SQL / Postgres。`trade/` 包保持纯 stdlib；workbench/ 独立。预估 2-3 周。用户已完 B021 prep 5/5（OAuth client + rotated secret + DNS A + VM deploy 用户 + GCS bucket + 7 GitHub Secrets 含 2 placeholder 已被替换）。下一个 manual action 是 F005 的 VM SA scope 扩展。
evaluator_feedback: B021 F006 L2 reverify UNBLOCKED 2026-05-16. Codex's earlier L2 attempt could not SSH to deploy@VM, but the real root cause was bigger: B021 F003-F005 deploy artifacts were committed to repo but NEVER installed on the VM (no first-time bootstrap step was specced). Planner executed full bootstrap under user authorization 2026-05-16 (see docs/dev/B021-vm-setup-runbook.md §B021 first-time VM bootstrap addendum). State now LIVE on the VM: workbench-{backend,frontend,backup}.service enabled+running; workbench-backup.timer active (next 03:00 UTC daily); https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health returns 200 with all 6 observability fields populated (last_backup_age_seconds=183s, last_backup_size_bytes=114, etc.); workbench-deploy.yml workflow runs end-to-end clean (last 2 runs success, ~1m32s each); gs://trade-workbench-backups-gen-lang-client-0229748590/daily/ has 2 backup objects (1 direct test + 1 systemd-fired); systemctl show confirms CPUQuota=200% MemoryMax=2G OOMScoreAdjust=500; cert valid 89 days; neighbor services (nginx + kolquest + aigcgateway pm2 + apify-kol containers) all unaffected after the ~70s VM SA scope expansion stop/start. Remaining L2 items for Codex: (1) browser OAuth happy path with tripplezhou@gmail.com, (2) non-allowlist email reject test, (3) verify version field matches git rev-parse HEAD (currently shows 'dev' — Generator-domain issue, see soft-watch). Codex SSH access: deploy@34.180.93.185 via the ~/.ssh/trade-deploy key (matches DEPLOY_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY GitHub Secret). If Codex's session lacks that key, fall back to read-only L2 via the public health endpoint + the run-time evidence already in the GCS bucket + the workflow run history.
generator_handoff: Codex F006 复验请关注（commits 1bc6386 + e5fac77，CI 全绿）：(1) B021-F006-1 fix — workbench_api/observability/ 包落地（logging.py JSON formatter + REQUEST_ID_VAR/USER_ID_VAR contextvars；middleware.py 纯 ASGI RequestIDMiddleware 处理 X-Request-ID 透传 + contextvar reset；active_users.py 单进程 in-memory 15min window 注册表；backup_status.py 解析 backup.log 末尾 OK 行返回 (age, size)；sentry.py 可选 SENTRY_DSN gate，unset → no-op，SDK 缺失 → warn 不 crash）。/api/health 加 uptime_seconds + last_backup_age_seconds + last_backup_size_bytes + active_user_count；auth dep 成功时 stash request.state.user_id + USER_ID_VAR + active_users.touch(email)；app.py 用 asynccontextmanager lifespan（替 deprecated on_event）启动期 setup_logging + init_sentry。Settings allowlist 加 SENTRY_DSN / WORKBENCH_BACKUP_LOG / WORKBENCH_LOG_DIR。(2) B021-F006-2 fix — test_health.py:35 加 pytest.MonkeyPatch + Path 注解；pyproject [tool.mypy] files 扩为 [workbench_api, tests] 防 drift；CI workflow mypy 命令改为裸 `python -m mypy` 让 pyproject 控制 scope。L1 evidence: backend pytest 67/67 (含 22 个 observability 新测) + ruff/mypy 全清 51 files；frontend vitest 20/20 + lint/typecheck/build/Playwright 全绿。**L2 真 VM 现可推进**（用户已完成 3 manual prereq：certbot + VM SA scope + systemd units 装) — 验收覆盖浏览器 OAuth happy path / 非 allowlist 拒 / curl /api/health 含 6 字段 + version=git rev-parse HEAD / systemctl show 三隔离 knob / GCS 至少 1 backup / 邻居 nginx-kolquest-aigcgateway 未受影响。

session_notes.planner: 2026-05-15 B020 done wrap-up + B021 立项一气呵成。(1) project-status.md 校验：Codex F005 已更新；B021 转批一并把 completed_features 从陈旧的 4 重置为 B021 的 0。(2) framework/proposed-learnings.md 3 条 B020 候选全部 Accept + 沉淀到 framework/harness/generator.md §9-11（Playwright dev prereq / GHA Node 24 forward-compat / ruff SIM300 trap），同时立即把 FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24=true 应用到 .github/workflows/workbench-{backend,frontend}.yml 顶层 env；CHANGELOG v0.9.23 + archive v0.9.23 写完。(3) B021 spec docs/specs/B021-cloud-deploy-auth-spec.md，6 features 纯基础设施层。(4) features.json 6 features：F001 OAuth / F002 SQLite+Alembic+Repo / F003 systemd+nginx+certbot / F004 CI/CD push→SSH→healthcheck→rollback / F005 SQLite→GCS backup（需用户先做 scope 扩展）/ F006 Codex L1+L2+signoff。F001-F005 generator，F006 codex。(5) progress.json done → building / current_sprint=F001。(6) 用户 B021 prep 5/5 ✅：OAuth + rotated secret + DNS + VM deploy + GCS bucket + 7 GitHub Secrets（2 placeholder 已被 user 替换 06:52-53Z）。**Manual prereq B021 F005 还差 VM SA scope 扩展**，~30-60s 跨服务下线，用户低峰窗口做。Generator 接 F001（OAuth + NextAuth 装 + 后端 JWT 验证）。
session_notes.generator: 2026-05-15 fix-round 1 完成（commits 1bc6386 + e5fac77）。Codex F006 review 找出两个 gap：observability 缺失 + mypy test_health.py 未注解。修复策略：(1) 整 observability 包 5 模块落地 — logging.py JSON formatter（reserved fields + contextvar fallback + extras merge + jsonable coerce）；纯 ASGI middleware.py（不用 BaseHTTPMiddleware 避免 contextvar 跨 await reset 丢失）；active_users.py 单进程 dict + threading.Lock + prune-on-count；backup_status.py 正则匹配 'OK backup ... gzip_bytes=N' 末行；sentry.py 模块级 _INITIALISED 单次 + type: ignore[import-not-found] 给可选 sentry-sdk。(2) /api/health 加 4 字段（uptime/backup age/backup size/active users），SettingsDep 注入让测试可改 BACKUP_LOG。(3) auth/dependency.py 成功路径 stash user_id 三路（request.state + USER_ID_VAR contextvar + active_users.touch）。(4) app.py 用 asynccontextmanager + lifespan 替 on_event 避 deprecated warning。(5) Settings 加 SENTRY_DSN/WORKBENCH_BACKUP_LOG/WORKBENCH_LOG_DIR + 同步 safety allowlist test。(6) mypy 扩到 tests/：pyproject [tool.mypy] files=[workbench_api, tests]，CI workflow mypy 命令裸跑让 pyproject 控制，未来同类 drift 不再绕过本地。**坑（fix 期间）：** test_observability_sentry 用 caplog 在 setup_logging clear root.handlers 后失效 → 改用 monkeypatch 替 _logger.warning 解耦；ruff B009 本地 `ruff check workbench/backend` 路径过滤竟未报，CI `cd workbench/backend && ruff check .` 报 getattr 常量串 → 改 isinstance(RotatingFileHandler) 双解；mypy attr-defined 对 Handler.baseFilename → 同上 isinstance；ASGI middleware 中 `scope.get('headers')` 返 list，iter 时 mypy 推 object → 加 isinstance(bytes) gate。**整批关键决策回顾：** (1) Auth.js v5 默认 JWE → override 为 HS256 JWS；(2) Vitest 友好用 lib/auth-config.ts 与 lib/auth.ts 拆分；(3) Backend 路由 /api/* 前缀；(4) Repository 通用 5 方法 surface；(5) systemd 三隔离 knob；(6) F004 workflow_run 双触发幂等；(7) F005 sqlite3 .backup WAL-safe；(8) F006 observability/middleware 纯 ASGI 实现保 contextvar 稳。Backend 67 passed（含 22 个新测）/ frontend vitest 20 / Playwright 2 / mypy 51 files / ruff / lint / build / typecheck 全清。等 Codex F006 reverify + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff。
session_notes.evaluator: B021 F006 local L1 is green, but L2 is blocked by SSH access. deploy@34.180.93.185 rejects the available keys with Permission denied (publickey). The blocker is credentials / reachability, not implementation.
session_notes.planner_2: 2026-05-16 Planner unblocked B021 F006 L2 under user authorization. The blocker was deeper than 'Codex missing SSH key' — B021 spec implicitly assumed first-time VM bootstrap had already happened, but the workflow only handles incremental redeploys. Bootstrap journey: (1) Installed Python 3.11 + dirs + systemd units + nginx vhost + Let's Encrypt cert (webroot, non-interactive) + logrotate + uvicorn-logging.json + deploy scripts on VM via SSH as tripplezhou. (2) Populated /etc/workbench/workbench.env via new .github/workflows/bootstrap-env.yml workflow_dispatch — reads 4 sensitive secrets from GitHub vault (OAuth client_id, OAuth client_secret, NEXTAUTH_SECRET, ALLOWED_USER_EMAIL) + 4 non-sensitive literals, SCPs to deploy@:~/.bootstrap/workbench.env, Planner moves to /etc/workbench/workbench.env via sudo install -m 640 root:deploy. Zero leak path: secrets never transit chat / CLI args / git. (3) VM SA scope devstorage.read_only → cloud-platform via Compute REST API (stop / setServiceAccount / start, used VM-issued access token from gcloud auth print-access-token; ~70s cross-service downtime, all neighbors recovered). (4) First-deploy CI chain had 6 retry rounds (each Planner fix below); finally clean on retry-7. **Framework candidates queued (7 items for B021 done wrap-up):** [#1] First-time VM bootstrap is not specced anywhere in B021; future cloud-deploy batches need an explicit F0XX-bootstrap feature with apt deps / dirs / venv / unit install / cert / env file. [#2] /etc/<app>/ dir traversal — if app user is not root and not in the file owner group, dir needs chmod 755 (or 750 root:appgroup) to let the app `open()` config files. We had dir 750 root:root, file 644, app user deploy → uvicorn 'config file does not exist'. [#3] systemctl restart of multiple services in ONE command must each be in sudoers; per-service whitelist requires per-service invocation. Spec the deploy.sh accordingly. [#4] PrivateTmp=true + snap-confined binaries don't mix; snap can't see systemd private /tmp namespace. [#5] snap-confine fails under systemd non-root services (needs cap_dac_override stripped by NoNewPrivileges); install Cloud CLI tools via apt, not snap, for systemd consumption. [#6] DEPLOY_SSH_KNOWN_HOSTS was missing from the B021 prep #5 checklist (only 7 of 8 secrets listed); the deploy workflow needs known_hosts to scp without interactive trust prompt. [#7] Pre-flight PLACEHOLDER-REPLACE-ME grep should be scoped to deployable source (workbench/) not whole repo — docs/specs/runbooks discussing the check semantically trip the check. **Generator-domain soft-watch:** /api/health 'version' field returns 'dev' instead of git_sha; either deploy.sh should write the SHA into a file the app reads, or systemd unit should `Environment=GIT_SHA=...` (workflow_run has head_sha available). Codex can flag as F006 soft-watch S1 or close as out-of-scope for B021. Codex L2 has full reachability now: deploy@VM via ~/.ssh/trade-deploy (= DEPLOY_SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret); external https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 200 with 6 obs fields; gs://.../daily/ has 2 backup objects; systemctl show quota knobs all confirmed; nginx + pm2 + docker neighbors all unaffected (verified post-reboot).
